votes.reason: WIL must gain a universally relevant payoff because the current system makes it a dominated choice in virtually all builds.
The redesign must preserve a real ATK/HP/WIL triangle rather than letting WIL become the new obvious max stat.
Non-transitive animal matchups are essential to prevent a solved meta and give each new animal a real strategic niche.
DoT needs strict safeguards because the prior Viper failure shows even modest-looking per-tick damage can become overwhelmingly oppressive.
Anti-melee, anti-sustain, and anti-burst-punish archetypes are necessary to check Bear/Boar-style stat-efficient bruisers.
Distinct strategic identity per animal is mandatory because clone-like kits would fail both variety and balance goals.
The frozen-core constraints should stand, and solutions must come from WIL redesign plus new animals rather than retroactively rewriting the base roster.
The proposed hybrid regen synthesis still overcorrects by making WIL scale too reliably in every long fight, which risks replacing the current trap with a new default stat.
